final_prompt.prompt:
Create a promotional marketing poster for a 跨境电商 campaign with a complex but structured visual composition.

Style/medium: needs a bold, editorial 跨境电商 promotional aesthetic with artistic lettering and typographic layering — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be 16:9 horizontal layout; must include typographic stacking (字体堆叠) with a product or hero subject physically overlapping and partially obscuring the background type layers
Subject: must include a product or hero subject as the focal element that occludes portions of the lettered background
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a high-energy promotional atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a vibrant, attention-grabbing direction — exact hues and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include artistic display lettering (艺术字) integrated into the composition as stacked typographic layers
Constraints: must preserve visual complexity without clutter — hierarchy must remain legible despite layering; product/subject must visibly overlap at least one text layer
Avoid: flat or sparse layouts; chaotic illegible compositions
